name: PAPARAZZI
description: Documentation-style overhead shoot. Phones and cameras capture your product from every angle. Locked cinematic reference. Clean, viral, premium.
asset_requirements: Your clothing item on a clean background. The locked reference scene handles everything else.

input_manifest.label: CLOTHING ITEM
input_manifest.hint: Your product on a clean background. It will replace the shirt in the locked overhead scene.

steps.prompt: Static overhead shot of a taped-down graphic t-shirt centered against a matte black backdrop. Multiple hands enter frame from all sides holding smartphones with ring lights, each screen lit bright, capturing the shirt from every angle. The shirt lies flat and perfectly centered. Shot with a medium-format film camera from directly above. Rembrandt lighting from above, dramatic shadows framing the shirt. Hyper-realistic photographic quality, fashion documentary style.
replace all t-shirts with uploaded black product remove hanger and tag on the right sleeve

Documentation overhead video. Multiple hands holding smartphones slowly circle around the clothing item laid flat on the matte black surface, ring lights glowing, each phone screen visible capturing the product. Slow cinematic rotation, dramatic top-down perspective, fashion documentary energy.
